CustomField.label: Consent Timestamp
CustomField.description: Timestamp DPDP consent was captured (REQ-046, design §2.3/§6.7), paired with VS_Consent_Given__c to make consent auditable (when, not just whether). THIS TICKET (VS-07) DEFINES THE FIELD ONLY: it is stamped by VS_PatientService.findOrCreate() (VS-10) on successful consent capture — no automation sets it in this ticket. Not required at the schema level since a patient row can exist transiently before consent is stamped by the service.
